executiveSummary: The CodeWorld Observatory is operating at Phase 10 (Research Export / Briefing Surface). Composite structural posture: pressured. 7 simulation session(s) recorded with 1 benchmark evaluation(s). 3 of 5 branch strategies are structurally favorable.

summaryCards.label: Composite Posture
summaryCards.detail: Composite posture is pressured: complexity is high; dependency pressure is concentrated; evidence is thin.

sections.title: System State Overview
sections.content: Structural complexity is high with 144 files across 11 module boundaries. Dependency pressure is concentrated. Validation burden is heavy. Governance friction is smooth.

sections.title: Experiment Coverage
sections.content: 7 simulation session(s) and 1 benchmark run(s) recorded. Evidence coverage: 0 strong, 1 adequate, 0 insufficient.

sections.title: Strategy Landscape
sections.content: 3 strategy class(es) are structurally favorable: service-first, ui-first, minimal-touch. 0 are structurally misaligned: none.

sections.title: Transition Pattern Memory
sections.content: 2 recurring transition pattern(s) identified across 7 session(s). Dominant patterns: "Under moderate complexity, contained pressure, smooth friction → strategy "mixed" tends to dominate with "structurally-favorable" outcomes." (7 occurrences, high confidence); "Governance blocker "Requires explicit manual review. Risk unacceptably high." recurs across 7 session branch results, indicating a systemic constraint." (7 occurrences, high confidence).

evidenceRefs.label: Under moderate complexity, contained pressure, smooth friction → strategy "mixed" tends to dominate with "structurally-favorable" outcomes.
Governance blocker "Requires explicit manual review. Risk unacceptably high." recurs across 7 session branch results, indicating a systemic constraint.

sections.title: Calibration State
sections.content: Prediction-reality calibration covers 1 evaluation(s). Alignment score: 100.0%. Movement: insufficient-evidence. Only 1 prediction-reality comparison(s) available. Minimum 3 required for trend classification.

findings.title: Pressured Composite Posture
findings.summary: Structural analysis indicates a pressured composite posture. Composite posture is pressured: complexity is high; dependency pressure is concentrated; evidence is thin.

findings.title: Calibration Loop Active
findings.summary: Prediction-reality calibration has 1 evaluation(s) with insufficient-evidence movement.

constraints.constraint: All predictions are deterministic structural calculations, not learned probabilistic models.
constraints.implication: Prediction quality is bounded by the fidelity of static analysis proxies. No neural world model is active.

constraints.constraint: Calibration loop requires executed interventions with recorded outcomes to produce trend data.
constraints.implication: Systems with no executed interventions cannot derive calibration scores or movement trends.

constraints.constraint: Dependency analysis is limited to static import/require resolution.
constraints.implication: Cross-module runtime event bubbling, dynamic imports, and reflection-based coupling are not captured.

constraints.constraint: Strategy compatibility is computed from threshold-gated structural descriptors, not empirical outcome data.
constraints.implication: Compatibility assessments may diverge from actual intervention success rates as code complexity grows.

recommendedNextSteps.action: Record prediction-reality comparison data from at least 3 executed interventions.
recommendedNextSteps.rationale: Calibration trend requires multiple data points to derive movement classification.

recommendedNextSteps.action: Address structural pressure driving pressured posture. Focus on highest-pressure descriptor.
recommendedNextSteps.rationale: Composite posture is pressured: complexity is high; dependency pressure is concentrated; evidence is thin.

recommendedNextSteps.action: Export the current briefing as a persisted artifact for longitudinal comparison.
recommendedNextSteps.rationale: Persisted briefings enable cross-session posture drift detection and historical audit.

recommendedNextSteps.action: Extend observation encoder to capture cross-module event bus routing and dynamic imports.
recommendedNextSteps.rationale: Current static analysis misses runtime coupling, limiting dependency pressure accuracy.

knownLimitations: This briefing synthesizes from deterministic structural signals. No learned connectionist model is active.
Strategy trends are derived from branch-ID heuristics and first-class metadata — not from validated causal inference.
Evidence sufficiency labels reflect benchmark heuristic coverage, not independent verification.
Cross-module runtime event bubbling cannot be captured by static AST proxy layers.
Calibration alignment scores represent structural proximity, not prediction accuracy in the statistical sense.
